summary:
Plan to restructure deploy-posh.ps1 into deploy-v2.ps1 with two core fixes:
1. Complete file staging instead of cherry-picking (fixes missing changes)
2. Blue-green deployment pattern: install deps in a parallel directory while old version serves traffic, then atomic cutover in <3 seconds (fixes downtime)
Preserves all existing professional standards (dry-run, guards, health checks) and adds automatic rollback on failure.
